en.extract:
Elliot's laughingthrush (Trochalopteron elliotii) is a bird species in the family Leiothrichidae.
It is found in central China and far northeastern India, in shrubs and in forests with a combination of coniferous and deciduous trees.


References

BirdLife International 2004.  Garrulax elliotii.   2006 IUCN Red List of Threatened Species.   Downloaded on 25 July 2007.


External links
Elliot's laughingthrush videos on the Internet Bird Collection
Images at ADW

'''Elliot's laughingthrush''' ('''''Trochalopteron elliotii''''') is a [[bird]] [[species]] in the [[Family (taxonomy)|family]] [[Leiothrichidae]].

It is found in central [[China]] and far northeastern [[India]], in shrubs and in forests with a combination of coniferous and deciduous trees.<ref>{{Cite journal |last1=Liu |first1=Pengfei |last2=Qin |first2=Xuexue |last3=Shang |first3=Fei |date=2021 |title=Breeding Biology of Two Coexisting Laughingthrush Species in Central China |journal=Pakistan Journal of Zoology |volume=53 |issue=6 |doi=10.17582/journal.pjz/20181231011206 |issn=0030-9923|doi-access=free }}</ref>

==References==

zh.extract:
橙翅噪鹛（学名：Trochalopteron elliotii），是圓翅噪鶥屬（原属噪鹛属）的一种鸟类，分布于印度和中国大陆。该物种的保护状况被评为无危。2021年1月，由特有种升级为中国国家二级保护动物。
橙翅噪鹛的栖息地包括乡村花园、亚热带或热带的高海拔疏灌丛、亚热带或热带的湿润山地林和耕地。该物种的模式产地在四川宝兴。


亚种
橙翅噪鹛昌都亚种（学名：Garrulax elliotii bonvalotii）。分布于印度以及中国大陆的西藏等地。该物种的模式产地在西藏昌都地区贡觉兰达。
橙翅噪鹛指名亚种（学名：Garrulax elliotii elliotii）。分布于印度以及中国大陆的青海、甘肃、陕西、四川、湖北、云南等地。该物种的模式产地在四川宝兴。
